criteriaScores.notes: All 5 sliders with real-time input events. 13 dedicated tests.
Proper linear RGB interpolation, live preview, 10 tests.
Oval, triangle, rectangle with aspect and roundness. 17 tests.
All 6 pieces with geometric primitives. 16 tests.
Polar warp with precomputed LUT. Minor triangle roundness inconsistency.
Uses pixel compositing instead of ctx.clip(). Distortion disabled at UI level only.
7 sections, 3 start collapsed. No keyboard/ARIA accessibility.
TouchHandler integrated, 21 tests. No explicit integration test with shapes.

feedback: Strong implementation scoring 90/100. Color params, gradient editor, shape boundaries, and chess pieces are well-architected with comprehensive tests. Main shortcoming is L-System masking uses pixel compositing instead of ctx.clip(), and triangle roundness formula inconsistency between ShapeBoundary.ts and DistortionLUT.ts.
recommendations: Unify triangle roundness formula between ShapeBoundary.ts and DistortionLUT.ts
Add engine-level enforcement preventing distortion mode for L-Systems
Add ARIA attributes and keyboard support to collapsible headers
criticalIssues: Triangle roundness formula inconsistency between ShapeBoundary.ts (lerp toward centroid) and DistortionLUT.ts (simple scale)
